title: Gray Squadron (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:Gray_Squadron_Bomber_XW2.png|thumb|right|250px|A Rebel Alliance Y-wing bomber from Gray Squadron]]
These '''[[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]]''' are known to have used the designation '''"Gray"''':

==Canon==
*'''[[Gray Squadron (Rebel Alliance)|Gray Squadron]]''': A [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] starfighter squadron that served throughout the [[Galactic Civil War]].

==Legends==
*'''[[Gray Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gray Squadron]]''', the name of a squadron that served the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
*'''[[Wraith Squadron|Gray Squadron]]''', the name of [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]' training squadron before it became [[Wraith Squadron]].
*'''[[Gray Squadron (Empire of the Hand)|Gray Squadron]]''', an [[Empire of the Hand]] squadron commanded by [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]].
*'''[[Gray Squadron (Aleph-class)|Gray Squadron]]''', a [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] squadron of [[Aleph-class starfighter|''Aleph''-class starfighter]].
*'''[[Gray Squadron (New Jedi Order)|Gray Squadron]]''', the name of the squadron that served the [[New Jedi Order]] during the [[Operation Shieldfall|Battle on Nam Chorios]].

{{Disambig}}

{{Interlang
|pt=Esquadrão Cinza
}}
